expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Enable admins to invite members, change roles, revoke access, and review membership audit history.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership invitation and audit event persistence",
      "description": "As a system, I want storage for invitations and membership audit events so that member-management actions are durable and traceable.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Database schema includes membership invitations and membership audit event records",
        "Audit events can store actor, target member, action type, and timestamp",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/db/migrations/*membership*",
        "src/db/schema/membership.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Implement admin invite-member operation",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email so that I can grant workspace access without direct database edits.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin-only backend operation accepts workspace id and invitee email",
        "Successful invite creates an invitation record",
        "Invite action writes a membership audit event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace-members/invite.*",
        "src/api/workspaces/*members*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Implement admin member role-change operation",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change member roles between viewer, editor, and admin so that permissions stay aligned with responsibilities.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin-only backend operation updates member role to viewer, editor, or admin",
        "Invalid roles are rejected",
        "Role-change action writes a membership audit event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace-members/change-role.*",
        "src/api/workspaces/*members*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Implement admin revoke-access operation",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke a member's workspace access so that former collaborators no longer retain permissions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin-only backend operation revokes selected member access",
        "Revoked member no longer appears in active workspace membership",
        "Revoke action writes a membership audit event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace-members/revoke-access.*",
        "src/api/workspaces/*members*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add workspace settings member-management controls",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want invite, role-change, and revoke controls in workspace settings so that I can manage membership from the UI.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings shows an invite form by email",
        "Each member row exposes role selection for viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Each member row includes revoke access action",
        "UI actions call the corresponding member-management operations",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/workspace-settings/members.*",
        "src/components/member-role-select.*",
        "src/components/member-invite-form.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Show recent membership changes in workspace settings",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can audit invites, role updates, and revocations.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings includes a recent membership changes view",
        "View lists action type, actor, target member, and timestamp",
        "List is ordered by newest first",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/workspace-settings/membership-audit.*",
        "src/server/workspace-members/list-audit-events.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
